calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Off Calendar

Exparte Motion For Default Judgment Order Against Def E Garcia With Declaration Of Attorney Mario Jovel And Exhibits In Support Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Edward Garcia.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3670. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Mario J. Jovel, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Rudolph Martinez, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Edward Garcia.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Personally Injury was filed on March 12, 2015.
Substitute service of the Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages on defendant Edward Garcia occurred on June 18, 2015 and was effectuated on July 1, 2015.
Default as to defendant Edward Garcia was entered on June 25, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, January 9, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Rudolph Martinez, and against the defaulted defendant Edward Garcia, as follows:

Economic Damages - $4,326.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $20,000.00.
Costs - $1,008.00.

Total - $25,334.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
